summary: Comprehensive testing of all 10 dark mode/layout fixes from iteration 276. All 10 test items PASSED. Key fixes verified: .aa-bg uses CSS variables (not hardcoded #ffffff), Midnight Tech dark theme applies automatically on fresh load, store layout is side-by-side at 1280px, hero sections have visible depth, Shadcn CSS vars are dark-mode aware, Slate Pro restores full light mode, mobile store filters work correctly.

issues: Stats summary cards (Total Customers, Active, New This Month) use 'bg-slate-50/40' which computes to rgba(248,250,252,0.4). In dark mode, this becomes rgba surface at 40% opacity - looks like a subtle teal-dark shade which is acceptable but slightly inconsistent with the flat dark theme. Not a critical issue.

test_results_detail.T1_page_background: PASS - aa-dark=True, --aa-bg=#0d1117, body=rgb(13,17,23) on fresh load without partner code
test_results_detail.T2_admin_panel_full_dark: PASS - No white large elements found, table headers=rgb(33,38,45)/muted text, bg-white elements all compute to dark colors via aa-dark overrides
test_results_detail.T3_store_layout_desktop_1280px: PASS - flex-direction=row, aside=block/256px, mobile-filters-toggle hidden at 1280px
test_results_detail.T4_hero_depth: PASS - Hero=rgb(22,27,34) #161b22, Page=rgb(13,17,23) #0d1117, color difference=30 units (distinct layers)
test_results_detail.T5_shadcn_dark: PASS - --muted lightness=15% (dark), --secondary dark, --popover dark, Select dropdown bg=rgb(13,17,23) with light text, table headers dark
test_results_detail.T7_store_mobile_390px: PASS - Filters button visible, sidebar display=none by default, flex-direction=column, clicking Filters shows sidebar (display=block)
test_results_detail.T8_dot_pattern_hero: PASS - aa-grid-texture class on hero, CSS rule: radial-gradient(circle at 1px 1px, color-mix(in srgb, var(--aa-primary-fg) 18%, transparent) 1px, transparent 0)
test_results_detail.T9_loading_ring: PASS - border uses var(--aa-border), borderTopColor uses var(--aa-accent) (CSS variables, not hardcoded)
test_results_detail.T10_glass_card: PASS - background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--aa-card) 85%, transparent) (CSS variable based, adapts to dark mode)

action_items: INFO: Stats cards in admin panel use bg-slate-50/40 which has 40% opacity in dark mode - renders as subtle teal shade. Not breaking but could be refined for a fully flat dark look.

NOTE: The known persistence bug (dark mode fails when aa_partner_code='AA' is in localStorage) from iteration 275 was NOT retested - it was a pre-existing issue not in scope for this iteration's fixes. The current fixes (CSS variable-based .aa-bg gradients) correctly resolve the white-background issue when dark mode IS applied (with platform tenant/no partner code).
critical_code_review_comments: All 10 fixes verified correct. .aa-bg now uses background-color: var(--aa-bg) + CSS variable radial gradients - no hardcoded white values.
WebsiteContext _applyBrandingToDOM: Shadcn CSS vars (--muted, --secondary, --popover, --border) correctly set to dark equivalents when luminance < 0.08, restored to light defaults when >= 0.08.
Store.tsx aside className correctly uses 'hidden md:block' without conflicting w-full when sidebar is not mobile-toggled.
Midnight Tech preset: primary=#161b22 (hero), bg=#0d1117 (page), surface=#21262d (elevated) - 3-layer depth working as designed.
glass-card uses color-mix(var(--aa-card)), loading-ring uses var(--aa-border)/var(--aa-accent) - both CSS variable based.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dark mode fixes from iteration 276 verified PASS. Test setup: clear localStorage, set aa_token (platform admin, no partner code) to get platform Midnight Tech dark theme. Admin login: curl POST /api/auth/login with admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! returns 'token' field. Then set localStorage.setItem('aa_token', token) and navigate to /store or /admin. Key: no aa_partner_code in localStorage = platform dark theme loads. Known pre-existing issue: dark mode persistence with aa_partner_code='AA' (AA tenant has no dark colors) - not fixed in this iteration.
